description_long: This is a modern, upright rolling suitcase with a hard rectangular shape and a matte black exterior. It features a telescopic handle extending from the top, allowing for easy maneuverability, and four green-accented spinner wheels at the base for multidirectional movement. The front face displays two horizontal zippered pockets, providing quick access to smaller items or documents. The main compartment is accessed via a zipper that runs along the perimeter of the front panel. The sides include a molded side handle and subtle reinforcement, while the back is plain with only the telescopic handle visible. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban travel and daily commuting.
description: A sleek, black upright rolling suitcase with a telescopic handle, four spinner wheels, and two front zippered pockets.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain black panel, the telescopic handle, and two green-accented wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting two horizontal zippered pockets and the main zipper track, with the telescopic handle extended.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a molded side handle and two green-accented wheels visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain back panel and the telescopic handle, with no pockets or additional features.
attribute_handle_type: telescopic top handle, fixed side handle
attribute_zipper_configuration: Three zipper tracks: two horizontal single zippers on the front pockets, one perimeter double zipper for the main compartment
